task: Find the cheapest certified pre-owned Porsche 911 with a model year of 2019 or newer, within a 200-mile radius of ZIP code 97007.
graderReasoning: The agent reached Porsche Finder, set the search to Certified Pre-Owned, ZIP 97007, radius 200 miles, selected model line 911, and sorted by Price - Low to High. The final results page explicitly showed 'Porsche 911 Buy Certified Pre-Owned', '97007 (+200 mi)', and sort 'Price - Low to High'. In the visible results, the cheapest 911 was a 2018 model at $124,198, which was correctly excluded because the task required 2019 or newer. The next qualifying result shown was a 2020 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S at $145,192, 765 miles, from Porsche Bellevue 153 miles away, with a matching details link. This supports the agent's final answer.
final_result_response:
Cheapest matching listing I found:

**2020 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S (992 I)**  
- **Price:** **$145,192.00** excl. taxes, incl. fees  
- **Mileage:** 765 mi  
- **Certified Pre-Owned:** Yes  
- **Dealer:** Porsche Bellevue, Bellevue, WA 98005  
- **Distance:** 153 miles from ZIP 97007  
- **Link:** https://finder.porsche.com/us/en-US/details/porsche-911-carrera-4s-preowned-0OVM6L?model=911&condition=porsche_approved&position=97007%2C45.45843%2C-122.8735%2C200&order=price_asc

I sorted Porsche Finder by **Price - Low to High** with filters for **911**, **Certified Pre-Owned**, and **97007 + 200 mi**. There was a cheaper 2018 911, but I excluded it because you asked for **2019 or newer**.
action_history: Opening Porsche website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.porsche.com/');
Opening Porsche inventory finder: await page.locator('e97').click();
Opening certified pre-owned inventory: await page.locator('e26').click();
Changing search ZIP code: await page.locator('e67').click();
Changing search ZIP code: await page.locator('e67').fill('97007');
Submitting ZIP code: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Selecting ZIP code suggestion: await page.locator('e241').click();
Opening radius filter: await page.locator('e70').click();
Choosing 200-mile radius: await page.locator('e70').click();
Choosing 200-mile radius: for (let i=0;i<5;i++) await page.keyboard.press('ArrowDown');
Choosing 200-mile radius: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Applying radius and model filters: await page.locator('fnssr-p-select-option').filter({hasText:'200 mi'}).first().click();
Applying radius and model filters: await page.locator('fnssr-p-select-option').filter({hasText:'911'}).first().click();
Opening filtered Porsche Finder URL: await openTab('https://finder.porsche.com/us/en-US/list?modelSeries=911&condition=porsche-approved&zipCode=97007&radius=200&sortBy=price_asc');

Opening corrected filtered search URL: await openTab('https://finder.porsche.com/us/en-US/search?condition=porsche_approved&position=97007%2C45.45843%2C-122.8735%2C200&modelSeries=911&sortBy=price_asc');
Opening model line dropdown: await page.locator('e38').click();
Selecting 911 from model dropdown with keyboard: await page.locator('e38').click();
Selecting 911 from model dropdown with keyboard: await page.keyboard.press('ArrowDown');
Selecting 911 from model dropdown with keyboard: await page.keyboard.press('ArrowDown');
Selecting 911 from model dropdown with keyboard: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Selecting 911 model line from current dropdown: await page.locator('e310').click();
Selecting 911 model line from current dropdown: await page.keyboard.press('ArrowDown');
Selecting 911 model line from current dropdown: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
